description_long: This is a modern, two-story house enclosed within a brick perimeter wall, featuring a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular form. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a glass door, flanked by large windows and a garage door integrated into the wall. A single, leafy tree is situated in the front yard, providing natural shade and visual interest. The rear of the house is characterized by a central brick chimney and a series of evenly spaced windows, with a paved area extending from the back door. The exterior is predominantly smooth and light-colored, contrasting with the textured brick boundary. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor space, and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a brick perimeter wall, featuring a front yard tree and integrated garage. The design is minimalist and urban, with clean lines and a light exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, garage door, and a tree in the front yard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the tree, the flat roof, and the expanse of the brick wall enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with a central chimney, multiple windows, and a paved backyard area.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side windows, the tree in the backyard, and the continuation of the brick wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a glass door, no porch, integrated into the facade with large windows and a paved approach.
